text: vv. 2, 3: The forty-two months, or twelve hundred and sixty days, represent three and a half years. These, with the three and a half days of verse 11, recall the ‘time, times, and half a time’ of Dan. 12.7 (cf. 12.14 below).
The language of prophecy is here exchanged for that of narrative, the Apostle being so absorbed by his vision that he feels plunged, as it were, into the events he is describing.
